meta.question: Show the trace from "High singal exposures" to the analyses that verify it.
meta.finalAnswer:
**Trace from "High signal exposures" to Analyses:**

**1. Requirement: "High signal exposures"**
- Type: tmt:requirement
- Location: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Black Box Specification::Requirements::04 APS L3 Requirements::L3 APT Requirements
- **Requirement Text:** "APT shall achieve SNR>5 (TBR) for a 0.1sec exposure on a 0th magnitude star"

**2. Dependency Link:**
- The requirement is connected via a dependency relationship (`_18_0_2_b4c02e1_1443122846698_699746_180578`) to:
  - **Supplier:** "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity" (hierarchyelement)

**3. Connected Analyses:**
The "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity" element is linked to multiple analyses through dependencies, including:

- **Pupil Alignment Error Budget** (package)
  - Location: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::10 Analysis::Roll-up Analyses::Error Budgets
  
- **m3 to APS-TMT Interface Point Alignment Error Analysis** (instance specification)
  - Contains knowledge components:
    - "knowledge of APT-TMT interface point"
    - "error between Reference Point and fiducials"
    - "error in global alignment of APS using fiducials (by TMT)"

**4. Related Analysis Elements:**
- "Knowledge of APT-TMT interface point" (block)
- "Alignment of M3 to APS-TMT interface point" (part property)
- Multiple instance specifications representing error analysis results

The trace shows that the "High signal exposures" requirement (which specifies SNR>5 for 0.1sec exposure on 0th magnitude star) is verified through the APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity analysis, which feeds into the Pupil Alignment Error Budget and the m3 to APS-TMT Interface Point Alignment Error Analysis.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("High signal exposures"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signal"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("exposure")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("analyse")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("analysis")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signal")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("exposure")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?dep ?depType ?client ?clientName ?supplier ?supplierName WHERE {
  VALUES ?dep { 
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/dependency/_2ca33d85-e793-40fa-9f3a-b3c90e37fd87__a677041a-7a9e-4df2-9fb8-182afa655a77>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/dependency/_2ca33d85-e793-40fa-9f3a-b3c90e37fd87__217837b9-0af2-4092-a89b-ee142f8e7bcf>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/dependency/_24b6f607-6246-4358-928e-62e862ed9dc0>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/dependency/_18_0_2_b4c02e1_1443122820811_276266_180570>
  }
  ?dep rdf:type ?depType .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  ?client vocab:NamedElement_name ?clientName .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
  ?supplier vocab:NamedElement_name ?supplierName .
}
LIMIT 50

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?analysis ?analysisName ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Pupil%20Alignment%20Error%20Budget" .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?analysis .
  ?analysis vocab:NamedElement_name ?analysisName .
  ?analysis rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have traced the requirement "High signal exposures" through the model. The requirement is linked via a dependency to "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity" which in turn connects to various analysis elements including the "Pupil Alignment Error Budget" and "m3 to APS-TMT Interface Point Alignment Error Analysis". The requirement text states "APT shall achieve SNR>5 (TBR) for a 0.1sec exposure on a 0th magnitude star".
